Lyrics.text:
Eny, ho satriko, ho mamiko ry Tompo tia,
Ny hipetraka eo anilanao ho zanakao.
Ka na lavitra, na sarotra, izany dia,
Ry Tompo ô, anilanao no tiako.

Lyrics.label: ref
Lyrics.text:
Eo anilanao, ry Jeso ô, anilanao
Eo anilanao tsy mety ho lao
Ka na lavitra, na sarotra izany dia
Ry Tompo ô, anilanao no tiako.

Eny, ho sambatra raha toa onenanao ny fo
Eny, ho sambatra, ho tretrika, ry Ray Tsitoha.
Sento sy lonjony dia tsy hisy intsony izao
Ry Tompo ô! raha Ianao no hanjaka ao.

Eny, ho ory! Loatra ny fanahy,
Eny, ho ory aho raha Ianao no lavitra ahy
Ka na dia mivily aza izao ’ty zanakao,
Ry Tompo ô! aoka Ianao no tsy handao.
